name: slskd
short_desc: Modern client-server application for the Soulseek file-sharing network.
author: slskd
description: slskd is a modern client-server application for the Soulseek file-sharing network. It provides a web-based UI to search, download, and share files on the Soulseek network. Features include configurable shared directories, upload/download slot management, speed limits, user groups, chat rooms, and API key support for integration with tools like Soularr.

form_fields.label: Downloads Path (host)
form_fields.hint: Path on the host where slskd downloads will be stored. This should be accessible by Soularr/Lidarr for import.

form_fields.label: Remote Configuration
form_fields.hint: Allow modifying configuration from the web UI. Disable for internet-facing deployments.
